steps.observed: Sign-up form displayed with 'Create an account' heading

steps.expected: Name, email, password fields and submit button
steps.observed: Found textbox 'Name', textbox 'Email', textbox 'Password', button 'Sign Up', link 'Sign in'

VAL-SHELL-004.title: Sign-up successful flow

steps.action: Fill name 'Test User One', email 'testuser1@example.com', password 'TestPassword123!'

steps.observed: POST /api/auth/sign-up/email -> 400, error message 'Email and password sign up is not enabled'

evidence.network: POST /api/auth/sign-up/email -> 400 {"message":"Email and password sign up is not enabled","code":"EMAIL_PASSWORD_SIGN_UP_DISABLED"}

issues: KNOWN ISSUE: Better-Auth config in apps/web/src/lib/auth.ts is missing emailAndPassword: { enabled: true }. The sign-up API endpoint returns HTTP 400 with 'Email and password sign up is not enabled'. User cannot sign up via email/password until this config is added.

steps.observed: Login form displayed with 'Welcome back' heading

steps.expected: Email, password fields, submit button, link to sign-up
steps.observed: Found textbox 'Email', textbox 'Password', button 'Sign In', link 'Sign up' pointing to /sign-up

VAL-SHELL-007.title: Login invalid credentials shows generic error

steps.expected: Generic error message without distinguishing email vs password
steps.observed: Error message 'Invalid email or password' displayed — generic, does not reveal which field is wrong

issues: NOTE: The underlying API returns 'Email and password is not enabled' (400) due to missing Better-Auth emailAndPassword config, but the UI correctly maps this to a generic 'Invalid email or password' message. The assertion passes because the UI behavior matches spec (generic error), though the root cause of the error is a config issue, not actual credential validation.

steps.observed: Errors displayed: 'Name is required', 'Email is required', 'Password is required'

steps.action: Fill invalid email 'not-an-email' and short password 'short', submit
steps.observed: Errors displayed: 'Please enter a valid email address', 'Password must be at least 8 characters'
Errors displayed: 'Email is required', 'Password is required'

steps.action: Fill invalid email 'bad-email' on sign-in, submit
steps.observed: Error displayed: 'Please enter a valid email address'

frictions.description: agent-browser 'click' on form submit button does not trigger React's onSubmit handler for controlled forms. Had to use eval with dispatchEvent to submit forms for validation testing.
frictions.resolution: Used agent-browser eval to dispatch submit event directly: document.querySelector('#form-id').dispatchEvent(new Event('submit', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true }))

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 4 passed, 1 failed. VAL-SHELL-003 (sign-up form renders) PASS. VAL-SHELL-004 (sign-up flow) FAIL — Better-Auth emailAndPassword not enabled, API returns 400. VAL-SHELL-005 (sign-in form renders) PASS. VAL-SHELL-007 (invalid credentials generic error) PASS — UI shows 'Invalid email or password'. VAL-SHELL-017 (client-side validation) PASS — both forms show required, email format, and password length errors.
